<table class="infobox">
<tr><th colspan="2" class="infobox-title">{{{name}}}</th></tr>
{{#if:{{{cover|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-image">{{{cover|}}}{{#if:{{{caption|}}}|<div class="infobox-caption">{{{caption|}}}</div>}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{released|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Released</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{released|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{isbn|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">ISBN</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{isbn|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{publisher|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Publisher</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{publisher|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{pages|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Pages</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{pages|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{follows|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Follows</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{follows|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{precedes|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Precedes</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{precedes|}}}</td></tr>}}
</table><noinclude>Book infobox (generated; styling in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]]).</noinclude>
